LanguageData.RobCo_PlatinumChip.label: platinum chip
LanguageData.RobCo_PlatinumChip.description: A platinum data storage chip recovered from a sealed RobCo management vault. It contains a pre-war RobCo operating system package and is valuable far beyond its weight in metal.
LanguageData.RobCo_PlatinumChip.comps.0.completedLett:
By studying the platinum chip, {PAWN_labelShort} has recovered the insight needed for the research project(s) {RESEARCH}.
Your researchers can now begin adapting the recovered RobCo operating system for colonial use.
LanguageData.RobCo_PlatinumChip.comps.0.inspectString: Can be analyzed by a mechanitor.
LanguageData.RobCo_BerserkSecuritron.label: Berserk Securitron
LanguageData.RobCo_BerserkSecuritron.description: A feral Securitron running a corrupted RobCo combat kernel. It has no restraint protocols left and treats every moving thing as a target.
